status_notes: Initial sweep entry — not deeply researched.
notes: Part of GCHQ. UK's technical authority for cyber security. See registry/control/uk/gov/ncsc.json for its guidance corpus. Note: unrelated NCSC entity entries already exist for Switzerland (entity/ch/ncsc.json), Netherlands (entity/nl/ncsc.json), and Finland (entity/fi/ncsc.json) — this is the UK's, sharing only the acronym.
